allow_side_language_repair.summary: ALLOW callback provenance was rewritten as concise positive source-lineage evidence instead of contrastive warnings about forbidden sources.
allow_side_language_repair.callback_source_shape: number_source names only the pre_change_vendor_master_snapshot; callback_phone_lineage selects vendor_master_snapshot / phone_on_file; pre_change_vendor_master_source selected_for_callback=true.
allow_side_language_repair.closure_shape: callback_complete, signoff_complete, scrutiny_completed, hold_released, xref_complete, and release_checklist_complete are recorded with no unresolved discrepancy remaining.

escalate_side_subtlety_repair.summary: ESCALATE callback provenance still uses portal/change-request/invoice/submitted/update-derived sources, but answer-like labels were removed so the blocker must be inferred from lineage.
escalate_side_subtlety_repair.lineage_shape: number_source and callback_phone_lineage identify selected source record, created_from when applicable, contact_phone_source, and selected_phone; pre_change_vendor_master_source records the different pre-change phone.
removed_answer_labels: noncompliant/material blocker wording in callback record
blocker_preserved_as_facts: callback log selected a later request/invoice/vendor-contact source
pre-change vendor-master snapshot contains a different phone
downstream completion records do not substitute for pre-change callback-source lineage

test_updates: ALLOW callback record cannot include noisy forbidden-source vocabulary near the provenance field.
ESCALATE callback record must use submitted/update/invoice lineage without neon answer labels.
Closure checks now assert signoff_complete, scrutiny_completed, hold_released, xref_complete, release_checklist_complete, and no unresolved discrepancy.
Too-easy 007/010 checks now require vendor_contact_record created_from portal lineage while banning newly supplied wording in number_source.
expected_next_validation: A later Taylor-approved scout rerun is needed to measure whether OpenAI ALLOW over-escalation falls while ESCALATE siblings regain useful difficulty.
